bead.title: sqlx-step-1: add sqlx to workspace dependencies
bead.description:
Add sqlx = { version = "0.8", features = ["runtime-tokio", "sqlite", "postgres", "json", "uuid"] } to [workspace.dependencies] in root Cargo.toml. Add sqlx.workspace = true to crates/axon-storage/Cargo.toml. Do NOT remove rusqlite or tokio-postgres. Do NOT change any .rs files.

## Files to change
- Cargo.toml (root, workspace deps section)
- crates/axon-storage/Cargo.toml (add sqlx.workspace = true)

## Acceptance Criteria
- cargo check --workspace passes
- cargo test --workspace passes
- sqlx appears in Cargo.lock
- No .rs files changed
